Video.summary: Day 11 of the challenge is centered around a quality that is perhaps the very essence of being a yogi: Compassion
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana
Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana
Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana

Video.summary: Today is day 12 of our challenge and the lesson is built around the standing posture Parsvakonasana A.

Yoga Is - Day 12 Gratitude Parsvakonasana A

Video.title: Smart Life S1E30

Smart Life S1E30
Smart Life S1E30

Video.summary: Founder, Glenn Marsden, of Imperfectly Perfect Campaign, and Jeremy Jackson, former Baywatch star share their personal journeys with body dysmorphia and how it led to a worldwide campaign. A young man faces his fears and a tale of kindness at 30,000 ft.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect
Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect
Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Video.summary: Laura Di Franco, CEO of Brave Healer Productions, discusses brave healing and the power of sharing our stories. And, meet Oyen the ginger cat and adorable kids from India, along with Daaji redefining meditation for a joyful heart.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Video.summary: Join The Kitchen Psychic, Hannah McKitrick, as we talk ditching diets, embracing food freedom, and finding lightness in mind and body, alongside Susan Noles from The Golden Bachelor for some fun, and meditation leader Daaji discussing compassion.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Video.summary: Fifteen Giants arrive in Auckland to face their first challenge and compete in teams to with the winning team being free of all consequences of a flying leap into the unknown.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 1

Image.alt: New Zealand Part 1
New Zealand Part 1
New Zealand Part 1

Video.summary: The losers are revealed and one member from each team faces their greatest fear of heights.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 2

Image.alt: New Zealand Part 2
New Zealand Part 2
New Zealand Part 2

Video.summary: Giants go through professional speakers training in order to uplevel their skill prior to taking the stage at the International Technical University of Auckland for INSPIRE Mic
Video.title: New Zealand Part 3

Image.alt: New Zealand Part 3
New Zealand Part 3
New Zealand Part 3

Video.summary: Giants prepare to face the tallest waterfall to commercially raft in the entire world.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 4

Image.alt: New Zealand Part 4
New Zealand Part 4
New Zealand Part 4

Video.summary: In preparation to meet the oldest, pre-Maori tribe of indigenous elders, the Giants call forth the dolphins, then enter the most sacred realm of their entire lives.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 5

Image.alt: New Zealand Part 5
New Zealand Part 5
New Zealand Part 5

Video.summary: If your mind feels foggy or unfocused, your food could be the missing piece. Mona unpacks how nutrition impacts your brain, mood, and energy—offering simple shifts to nourish your body and sharpen your mind from the inside out.
Video.title: Rooted in Wellness Autumn Smith EP 6

Image.alt: Rooted in Wellness Autumn Smith EP 6
Rooted in Wellness Autumn Smith EP 6
Rooted in Wellness Autumn Smith EP 6

Video.summary: In this episode of Rooted in Wellness, I’m joined by Darin Olien who explains the importance of nature and mindfulness practices for revolutionizing our health and happiness.
Video.title: Darin Olien: Everyday Products that Are Making You Sick + How to Return to a Toxin-Free Lifestyle

Image.alt: Darin Olien: Everyday Products that Are Making You Sick + How to Return to a Toxin-Free Lifestyle

Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle

Video.summary: Are you getting back into the dating game and wondering what to expect? And ever wonder why a kiss leaves you dizzy with desire? Answers to these questions and more this week on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Can You Want Too Much Sex?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Can You Want Too Much Sex?
Sex Talk - Can You Want Too Much Sex?
Sex Talk - Can You Want Too Much Sex?

Video.summary: Eighteen Giants take on the first fire walk ever created on the Galapagos Islands, and tensions arise as they learn about trusting each other and themselves.
Video.title: Ecuador Part 1

Image.alt: Ecuador Part 1
Ecuador Part 1
Ecuador Part 1

Video.summary: Fears surface to reveal hidden abuse when Giants take the stage at the International University of Quito for INSPIRE Mic to empower students and staff.
Video.title: Ecuador Part 2

Image.alt: Ecuador Part 2
Ecuador Part 2
Ecuador Part 2

Video.summary: Entering the Amazon, the Giants bring clean water solutions that last ten years, and train indigenous leaders from eleven villages.
Video.title: Ecuador Part 3

Image.alt: Ecuador Part 3
Ecuador Part 3

World's Greatest Motivators - Mary Morrissey

Video.summary: Blaine Bartlett, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.

Image.alt: World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett
World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett
World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett

Video.summary: Loss is inevitable, but self-blame and unhealed wounds can deepen the pain. This lesson explores how past hurt shapes our relationships, why we’re drawn to the familiar, and how romantic myths keep us stuck. By facing reality and healing old patterns, we find freedom and healthier love.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 6

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 6
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 6
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 6

Video.summary: Betrayal brings a unique grief because it comes from someone we trusted. The search for answers can keep us stuck, as the mind looks for reasons while the heart seeks healing. This lesson helps you process the pain, work with difficult thoughts, and rebuild trust and hope for the future.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 7

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 7
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 7
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 7

Video.summary: Job loss and estrangement can shake your identity and bring deep, often unspoken grief. This lesson helps you honor the sadness and anger, redefine yourself beyond work or broken ties, and move forward with clarity, confidence, and self-compassion.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 8

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 8
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 8
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 8

Video.summary: Facing death brings grief, hope, and hard decisions. This lesson explores being present at the end of life, understanding care options, and honoring the needs of the dying. By focusing on what matters most to your loved one, you can navigate this tender time with clarity and compassion.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 9

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 9
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 9
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 9
